# Oyoto

> Oyoto is a UK digital product studio founded by software engineer James Mboma. The site documents full-stack platforms, AI integrations, mobile apps, cloud systems, ecommerce builds, and digital strategy case studies.

## Core URLs

- Home: https://oyoto.co.uk/
- About: https://oyoto.co.uk/about
- Projects: https://oyoto.co.uk/projects
- Resume: https://oyoto.co.uk/resume
- Sitemap: https://oyoto.co.uk/sitemap.xml

## Services

- Full-stack development
- Cloud architecture
- UI/UX engineering
- AI integration
- Mobile apps
- Business intelligence
- Technical consulting

## Case Studies

- Congraduation: ecommerce photography platform for modern graduation ceremonies.
- VengCity: custom ecommerce launch for a streetwear brand.
- Trakr: AI-driven career intelligence and application tracking ecosystem.
- The Well Church: digital presence and high-availability streaming ecosystem.

## Contact

- Email: oyotostudios@outlook.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/mboma99
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/james-mboma/
